# Intervals for the closing probability functions during occupation in function of indoor temperatures (thermal comfort)
# rows: different room types 
# (1) Bathroom, (2) Bedroom, (3) Hallway, (4) Kitchen, (5) Living, (6) Office, (7) Toilet, Storage and (8) LivingKitchen
# columns: interval in which the closing probability function during presence should be located. 
# (1) lower function and (2) upper function

0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
0	5.5480173059351037e-14*exp(7.445218888089954*x-10.56396231638183) + 0.0066663693001455734
